_comment: Set SqlServer:ConnectionString, Redis:ConnectionString, and Api:BaseUrl via dotnet user-secrets. See docs/setup.md for docker-compose instructions. Example: dotnet user-secrets set "SqlServer:ConnectionString" "Server=localhost,1433;Database=AegisIdentity;User Id=sa;Password=Dev@AegisIdentity2024!;TrustServerCertificate=True" && dotnet user-secrets set "Redis:ConnectionString" "localhost:6379" && dotnet user-secrets set "Api:BaseUrl" "https://localhost:7068"
